content: Fixed process_invoice_through_template dead code in workflow_service.rs. The method was defined but never called because Wired template-based processing into process_invoice_workflow() by adding TR: WorkflowTemplateRepository generic param, Used Option<TR> pattern so existing new() still works for backward compat. with_templates() provides template-aware path. process_invoice_workflow() now checks for a default template first and falls through to flat rules. The invoice-processing crate's WorkflowEngine already had its own template wiring - this fix targets WorkflowService in core.
summary: Wired template stages into process_invoice_workflow in workflow_service.rs
